title: Local Schedule Status Controls Admission Draft Export
objective: Add a browser-local schedule/status controls admission draft export that defines the later proof requirements for schedule plans, status transitions, audit/readback, and downstream durable field record and production tracking boundaries before any write path is admitted.
scope: Add an Export Schedule Status Controls Draft action to the existing Field Prep Outputs rail.

Download one JSON artifact that includes field authorization assignment draft summary, proposed schedule/status packet, control readiness statuses, proposed packet sequence, authority boundary flags, and blocked write boundaries.
Keep the export local-only and informational.
Extend the focused Playwright smoke to prove the downloaded schedule/status controls admission draft artifact and zero mutation requests.
not_allowed: No Supabase, Render, Vercel, or Olares action.
No secret access or secret rotation.
No backend route or mutation route change.

No project import, workpackage rows, task rows, apparatus rows, field work authorization, assignment write, schedule plan contract write, status transition contract write, schedule/status mutation route, schedule/status audit write, schedule/status readback route, hosted schedule/status UI controls, durable field record, production tracking, workbook macro, or workbook writeback.
No service, auth, DNS, ingress, or control-plane widening.

schedule_status_controls_admission_draft.note: This lane creates local admission-design context only. Schedule plans, status transitions, schedule/status routes, durable field records, and production tracking remain blocked until later admitted packets own those write paths.

validation_steps: rg -n "PM Lane 152|Export Schedule Status Controls Draft|schedule-status-controls-draft|pm_lane_152_local_schedule_status_controls_admission_draft_v1|mutationRequests\)\.toHaveLength\(0\)" PROJECT_STATUS.md docs/operations ops/agents apps/operations-web
validation_result: PASS: operations-web typecheck passed, operations-web production build passed, focused PM import-intake Playwright smoke passed with 1 passed, packet JSON parsed, guardrail search confirmed PM Lane 152/schedule-status-controls-draft/zero-mutation evidence plus Desktop Codex parked language, and git diff --check passed.
sidecar_result: Desktop Codex NETA comparative-audit, topic-spine design, pilot-module blueprint, visual-assets structural-cleanup scout, heavy-audit cleanup cataloging phase-zero, study-root structural catalog cleanup scout, study-root manifest/freeze-gate, generated local build artifact cleanup, development temp evidence retention cleanup, development temp evidence archive long-path cleanup, and source-domain resources deletion review queue closeouts remain untracked and intentionally parked for a separate technical-authority review lane. They are not staged into PM Lane 152.
next_recommended_lane: Use this schedule/status controls admission draft as the no-write proof checklist for the Temp Power schedule/status lane. The next PM lane should either prepare a copy/paste executor packet for schedule/status admission design or continue to the durable field record and production tracking admission draft while writes remain blocked.
